title: valeriana ciliosa
intro: Valeriana ciliosa, also known as the fragrant valerian, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's roots and rhizomes are commonly used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, offering health benefits such as improved sleep quality and reduced stress levels. Valeriana ciliosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and muscle spasms.
